    • Class io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.client.eventbus.event.ClientRegisterRedirectEvent

      class ClientRegisterRedirectEvent extends org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • expires
          Integer expires
          302 响应中携带的新 Expires（秒），可能为 null
        • redirectContact
          String redirectContact
          重定向目标 SIP 服务器地址（来自 302 响应的 Contact 头：sip:user@host:port）
        • redirectHost
          String redirectHost
          重定向目标 SIP 服务器主机：IP[:port]
        • redirectPort
          Integer redirectPort
        • redirectUserId
          String redirectUserId
          重定向目标 SIP 服务器编码（GB28181 ID）
        • userId
          String userId

  • Package io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.event

    • Class io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.event.ServerLifecycleEvent

      class ServerLifecycleEvent extends org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • deviceId
          String deviceId
        • registerInfo
          RegisterInfo registerInfo
          type=REGISTER 或 OFFLINE 时非空
        • remoteAddressInfo
          RemoteAddressInfo remoteAddressInfo
          type=REMOTE_ADDRESS_CHANGED 时非空
        • sipTransaction
          SipTransaction sipTransaction
          type=ONLINE 或 OFFLINE 时非空
        • type
          LifecycleType type

    • Class io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.event.ServerNotifyEvent

      class ServerNotifyEvent extends org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • deviceId
          String deviceId
        • payload
          Object payload
          typed payload：DeviceAlarmNotify/DeviceKeepLiveNotify/MediaStatusNotify/MobilePositionNotify/UpgradeResultNotify/UploadSnapShotFinishedNotify

    • Class io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.event.ServerQueryResponseEvent

      class ServerQueryResponseEvent extends org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • deviceId
          String deviceId
        • extra
          String extra
          可选元数据：subscribe-response 携带 callId/statusCode；info-error 携带 reason；其它一般为 null
        • extraCode
          int extraCode
        • payload
          Object payload
          typed payload：DeviceCatalog/DeviceInfo/DeviceStatus/DeviceRecord/PTZPositionResponse/SDCardStatusResponse/HomePositionResponse/CruiseTrackListResponse/CruiseTrackResponse/DeviceConfigResponse/DeviceOtherUpdateNotify
        • sn
          String sn

    • Class io.github.lunasaw.gbproxy.server.transmit.event.ServerSessionEvent

      class ServerSessionEvent extends org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • callId
          String callId
        • deviceId
          String deviceId
          设备 ID（serverInvite 场景下为 toUserId）
        • errorMessage
          String errorMessage
          byeError 携带错误描述
        • fromUserId
          String fromUserId
          serverInvite 场景下：fromUserId / toUserId / SDP / transactionContextKey
        • sessionDescription
          GbSessionDescription sessionDescription
        • statusCode
          int statusCode
          invite-failure / ack 携带 SIP 状态码
        • toUserId
          String toUserId
        • transactionContextKey
          String transactionContextKey
        • type
          SessionType type
